case_title: SILVA, DONALD P. VS K & L AUTOMOTIVE INC et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT K & L AUTOMOTIVE INC ZUPAN, BARRY    AGENT FOR SERVICE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT SILVA, DONALD P. PROOF OF SERVICE WAIVED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,500.00 FILED BY SILVA, DONALD P. AS TO DEFENDANT K & L AUTOMOTIVE INC ZUPAN, BARRY    AGENT FOR SERVICE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-17-1997 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT C
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION NOV-17-1997, AUTOMATIC CONTINUANCE PER REQUEST TO DEC-02-1997 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT C

CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY K & L AUTOMOTIVE INC ZUPAN, BARRY    AGENT FOR SERVICE AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT SILVA, DONALD P. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-05-1998 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DEF. REQUEST FOR A CONTINUANCE TO BE SIGNED BY JUDGE DATE REQUESTED JAN.5,1998 3:30 PM.$10.00 FEE PAID.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION DEC-15-1997, CONTINUANCE ORDERED PER REQUEST TO JAN-05-1998 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT K & L AUTOMOTIVE INC
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION DEC-02-1997, AUTOMATIC CONTINUANCE PER REQUEST TO DEC-15-1997 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SILVA, DONALD P. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT K & L AUTOMOTIVE INC ZUPAN, BARRY    AGENT FOR SERVICE THE COURT ORDERS RESCISSION OF THE AGREEMENT BETWEEN THE PARTIES. DEFENDANT SHALL COOPERATE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
